customer_message: My son had swelling and hives after eating the Cedar & Oat Cocoa Protein Bar. He has a peanut allergy. The wrapper says almonds but no peanuts.
I got a rash and itchy throat after eating this bar. I noticed the batch code is CO-CPB-0426.
Customer reports stomach pain and says they are allergic to peanuts. Product was Cedar & Oat Cocoa Protein Bar batch CO-CPB-0426.
Retailer report: customer asked whether peanuts are included because they had an allergic reaction. Label only says milk and almonds.
I had shortness of breath after eating the cocoa bar. I went to urgent care. I am allergic to peanuts.
Bar tasted different and caused throat irritation. Batch CO-CPB-0426.
My daughter got hives. She has a known peanut allergy. No peanut warning on label.
Customer reports allergic reaction after Cedar & Oat bar. Batch number unreadable.
I had swelling and nausea after eating Cedar & Oat Cocoa Protein Bar batch CO-CPB-0426.
The label says almonds but not peanuts. My allergy symptoms started 20 minutes after eating.
Upset stomach after product. No allergy mentioned.
